series_metadata.series_title: Trade confirmations and purchase and maturity notices
series_metadata.series_description: Paper confirmations provided by brokers that document securities purchased and sold by the Treasurer of State. Also includes purchase and maturity notices sent by banks to inform the Treasurer that certificates of deposits purchased as part of the linked deposit program are approaching maturity. Note that not all institutions send paper notices.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 6 fiscal years., Paper: Shred
